cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(minimal_intro)

# --- Standard (file-based) build ---
add_executable(minimal_intro
    main.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(minimal_intro PRIVATE
    rev_platform
    rev_runtime
    rev_shader
    rev_xm
    rev_mesh
    rev_gltf
)

target_compile_definitions(minimal_intro PRIVATE REV_GLTF_AVAILABLE)

if(MSVC)
    set_target_properties(minimal_intro PROPERTIES
        LINK_FLAGS_RELEASE "/SUBSYSTEM:WINDOWS"
    )
endif()

# --- Packed (embedded assets) build ---
# packed_assets.h is generated by rev_pack into CMAKE_BINARY_DIR before this target is built.
add_executable(minimal_intro_packed
    main.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(minimal_intro_packed PRIVATE
    rev_platform
    rev_runtime
    rev_shader
    rev_xm
    rev_mesh
)

target_compile_definitions(minimal_intro_packed PRIVATE HIMYM_PACKED_ASSETS)

# Include CMAKE_BINARY_DIR so packed_assets.h and rev_pack.h can be found
target_include_directories(minimal_intro_packed PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/revision_libs/rev_pack/include
)

if(MSVC)
    set_target_properties(minimal_intro_packed PROPERTIES
        LINK_FLAGS_RELEASE "/SUBSYSTEM:WINDOWS"
    )
endif()

# packed_assets.h is written by the editor (rev_pack) just before invoking
# cmake --build. MSBuild cannot track that external write, so we force a
# recompile of main.cpp on every build of this target by touching the file
# pre-build. With VS generators, PRE_BUILD runs before any compilation rule.
add_custom_command(TARGET minimal_intro_packed PRE_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/main.cpp"
    COMMENT "Touching main.cpp to force fresh include of packed_assets.h"
    VERBATIM
)
